subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou at all times drink from the chalice of the All-Merciful's bounty the wine of divine knowledge, and be illumined by the lights of His countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله در کل احیان از کوس عنایت رحمن رحیق عرفان بیاشامی و بانوار وجه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
